summary: Control Plane API testing complete. All 15 /api/ops/* endpoints tested and working. 38 unit tests pass. 29 API integration tests pass (3 skipped due to no pre-existing failures). Full failure lifecycle verified: create -> list -> dry-run retry -> actual retry -> resolve/ignore. Permanent failure retry rejection working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Control Plane implementation is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Failure taxonomy (5 types) correctly implemented with keyword-based classification
Retry engine properly rejects permanent failures with clear error messages
Dry-run mode works correctly for safe operator verification
Secret access audit trail properly excludes sensitive data from responses
All 14 runbooks have complete required fields (id, title, description, category, severity, possible_causes, resolution_steps, retry_instructions, related_operations)
Alerting system with threshold-based triggers working correctly
Idempotent retry behavior verified - no duplicate operations
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test failures for lifecycle testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Control Plane (Phase 1-4) is complete and tested. 38 unit tests in test_controlplane.py cover failure classification, severity resolution, event building, secret access policy, runbooks, operation types, alerting thresholds, and status lifecycle. 32 API integration tests in test_controlplane_api.py verify all 15 /api/ops/* endpoints. Existing data: 196 stuck outbox events, 56 secret access audit records (8 anomalies), 5 alerts. Full failure lifecycle tested: create failure via FailureTracker -> list via API -> dry-run retry -> actual retry -> resolve/ignore.
verified_endpoints: GET /api/ops/overview - System health overview with failure counts, outbox status, sync rate
GET /api/ops/failures - List failures with filters (tenant_id, provider, failure_type, severity, status, operation_type) and pagination
GET /api/ops/failures/{failure_id} - Get single failure, returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/ops/failures/{failure_id}/retry - Retry with dry_run support, rejects permanent failures
GET /api/ops/outbox - Outbox monitor with pending, stuck, failed counts
GET /api/ops/imports - Import pipeline monitor with status counts
GET /api/ops/sync - Sync jobs monitor with success rate
GET /api/ops/secrets/audit - Secret access audit trail with pagination
GET /api/ops/secrets/anomalies - Secret access anomalies with count and recent list
GET /api/ops/runbooks - List all 14 runbooks, supports category filter
GET /api/ops/runbooks/{runbook_id} - Get single runbook, returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/ops/alerts/check - Trigger alert checks, returns fired alerts

lifecycle_test_results.create_failure: SUCCESS - FailureTracker.record() creates failure with correct taxonomy
lifecycle_test_results.dry_run_retry: SUCCESS - POST with dry_run=true returns would_retry=true without changes
lifecycle_test_results.actual_retry: SUCCESS - POST with dry_run=false executes retry and updates status
lifecycle_test_results.resolve_failure: SUCCESS - POST /resolve marks failure as resolved
lifecycle_test_results.ignore_failure: SUCCESS - POST /ignore marks failure as ignored
